description: All known 2026 NBA Draft pick trade obligations as of March 17, 2026. Sources: Hoops Rumors, Tankathon, ESPN, NBA.com.

simple_transfers.notes: LAC 2026 unprotected first-round pick owed to OKC (Paul George trade, 2019)
ORL 2026 first-round pick owed to MEM (Desmond Bane trade chain)
PHX 2026 first-round pick rights conveyed to CHA via Nurkic trade chain (Feb 2026); MEM holds swap rights but own pick is better

protected_transfers.notes: PHI 2026 first top-4 protected to OKC; if protected PHI owes OKC 2027 first (also top-4 protected)
HOU 2026 first top-4 protected was owed to OKC; OKC then traded obligation to PHI for Jared McCain (2026 trade deadline)
UTA 2026 first top-8 protected to OKC; if protected the obligation is extinguished
POR 2026 first top-14 protected to CHI; if protected POR owes CHI their 2027 first (also top-14 protected)
WAS 2026 first top-8 protected to NYK; if protected, WAS sends NYK 2026 and 2027 second-round picks instead

range_only_transfers.notes: IND 2026 first only conveys to LAC if pick slots 5-9 (Ivica Zubac trade, Feb 2026); stays with IND outside that range. Fallback: IND owes LAC 2031 unprotected first

swap_groups.notes: SAS/ATL/CLE 3-way: SAS gets best pick (SAS has swap rights on ATL from DeJounte Murray trade); ATL gets middle (ATL has swap rights on CLE from De'Andre Hunter trade); CLE gets worst
UTA/DET/MIN 3-way: UTA gets best pick; DET gets 2nd most favorable (Pistons receive second-most favorable); MIN gets worst (Timberwolves get least favorable)

best_of_groups.notes: ATL receives more favorable of NOP and MIL first-round picks (2025 draft night deal; Derik Queen trade); MIL receives the less favorable one

simple_transfers.notes: LAC 2026 second-round pick to BKN (complex chain via Nets/Nuggets/Grizzlies)
CLE 2026 second-round pick to LAC (acquired in James Harden trade)
BOS 2026 second-round pick to ATL (acquired in Kristaps Porzingis trade, 2025 offseason)

protected_transfers.notes: WAS 2026 second-round to NYK ONLY IF WAS first-round pick is top-8 protected (i.e., WAS keeps their first-rounder). WAS is currently slot 2 so this condition is met.
UTA 2026 second-round to SAS if pick lands slots 5-30 (picks 35-60); if pick is slots 1-4 (picks 31-34) the obligation is extinguished

best_of_groups.notes: Celtics get most favorable of DET/MIL/ORL second-round picks; ORL gets 2nd most favorable; NOP gets least favorable
MIA receives most favorable of DEN and GSW second-round picks; DEN receives the less favorable one
